subject: Re:
body:
yes

--- Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com> wrote:

> Got this e mail from Andrea - want to know if it's
> ok to give her a reference
> 
> Secondly, I have a big favor to ask, and I know that
> it couldn't be worse timing with you on your way to
> some remote location in the Pacific,  but I'm in the
> process of applying for a summer internship with the
> Clinton Administration (particularily his HIV/AIDS
> initative). I just found out the details of the
> application and I unfortunately have to have my
> packet
> submitted by March 15th, otherwise I would have
> waited
> until your return to speak to you about it. Because
> I
> have to include 2 letters of recommendation, I was
> wondering if you would be willing to write one of
> them. I'm sure it would speak loudly coming from you
> and I would really appreciate it. I would also like
> to
> use you as a reference on my resume if that is
> alright. Please let me know. Again, I'm sorry this
> comes at such an inconvenient time. 
> 
> 
> G
> 


__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?

http://mail.yahoo.com
body_html:
yes

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

Got this e mail from Andrea - want to know if it's
ok to give her a reference

Secondly, I have a big favor to ask, and I know that
it couldn't be worse timing with you on your way to
some remote location in the Pacific, but I'm in the
process of applying for a summer internship with the
Clinton Administration (particularily his HIV/AIDS
initative). I just found out the details of the
application and I unfortunately have to have my
packet
submitted by March 15th, otherwise I would have
waited
until your return to speak to you about it. Because
I
have to include 2 letters of recommendation, I was
wondering if you would be willing to write one of
them. I'm sure it would speak loudly coming from you
and I would really appreciate it. I would also like
to
use you as a reference on my resume if that is
alright. Please let me know. Again, I'm sorry this
comes at such an inconvenient time.

G
